programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On a cold day, few dishes are as comforting as a hearty soup—unless it turns out starchy or gluey. Watch as we make thick and creamy versions of two of our favorites: ham and split pea, and rustic potato-leek.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We traveled to chili country, cooked with various experts in their kitchens, and tried out dozens of recipes in the test kitchen. We wanted a chili that would be hearty, heavy on the meat, and spicy but not overwhelmingly hot.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Real country bread, the kind made by an artisan and never found at the supermarket, is a thing of beauty. We wanted to develop a recipe that was every bit as good as the best country loaves but that was still doable for the cook who bakes in a home oven.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: French country cooking has a way with chicken in a pot, whether it's the famous chicken with 40 cloves of garlic or the lesser-known chicken Provençal. These dishes take chicken to new heights—or go awry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most cooks are under the impression that good soup takes all day to prepare. We'll show you how to make simplified versions of two favorite soups: chicken noodle and Italian pasta and bean.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Soup for supper is an appealing concept, especially on a cold night. But for soup to work as a main course, it better be hearty. Our vibrant lentil soup fits the bill, and we round out this meal with quick cheese bread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.desc: Colt surrenders and seeks the help of the extermination team to help the dying Queen.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: After losing to Knuckle and Shoot, Gon and Killua return home to Palm.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: While Gon is on his date with Palm, Killua encounters Rammot in the forest. Just when their battle is about to begin, Killua hears his brother's voice in his head, telling him to run away.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle and Morel appear to be overwhelmed by the speed of Cheetu's attacks, but they have a chance at victory.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kalluto, Feitan, Shalnark, Phinks, Shizuku, and Bonolenov meet in Meteor City, the home of the Phantom Troupe. They have returned after getting the news that the Chimera Ant, Zazan, has built her nest in their city.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Strength
programme.desc: Jotaro’s group is rescued when they spot a giant cargo ship, but they soon find that the only occupant is a strange orangutan. Curious, they begin to explore the ship and solve its mysteries.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jotaro and his companions finally make it to a hotel in Singapore, but soon Polnareff falls into a trap set by a dangerous and brutal enemy.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw resorts to tank warfare to crush Kate Bliss's chances of profit. Kate finds out about a decisive naval confrontation while Paul heads to Southampton to discover how Britain's landscape has been mapped for generations.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Kate Bliss hope to capitalize on some risky buys. Paul believes a strange collection of medals will honor him with profits, but will a pricey three-figure gamble purchase pay off for Kate?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw's final trip sees them through Kent. At an incredible auction in Bury St. Edmunds, the Antiques Road Trip record profit is truly smashed, and when the gavel finally goes down one expert is left close to tears.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton are in the Scottish Borders with a '60s Jaguar. James resorts to a flashlight as he rummages in the dark for an occasional table while Christina hopes some silver-plated cutlery will serve up a profit.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton's are in the cold and snowy Trossachs. James investigates some ancient treasures in a Glasgow graveyard and farmer's wife Christina learns why it was the Scots who transformed arable farming.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton start in Levenshulme, Manchester. James has the unusual problem of having too much cash, while Christina struggles with her limited funds, deciding to gamble them on a worn toy train.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The seaside town of Southport in Merseyside is Christina Trevanion and James Braxton's next stop. Christina dibs her way to a purchase with a Scouting connection and James spends a vast amount of his cash on two Cantonese jardinières.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Whitley Bay, Christina Trevanion and James Braxton set off on their finale. Christina buys a Chinese silver bowl and James has found six Japanese porcelain teacups. After their buying spree, they head to Ayr for a memorable auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell is joined by new Road Tripper Arusha Irvine on a jaunt around Herefordshire's antique shops in a 1976 Triumph Stag. Phil's joined by Daphne, his dog, while Roo finds a 300-year-old example of Georgian glass.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trip regular, Phil Serrell, plays a safe bet with a mahogany breakfast table, while Arusha 'Roo' Irvine's all at sea, gambling on an antique pond yacht.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Phil Serrell explore Yorkshire and Derbyshire. Along the way they dig up coal mining musical history, Phil attempts to buy a horse and Roo picks up another piece of her favorite glassware.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and Roo Irvine explore Oxfordshire. However, will the Stratford upon Avon auction supply comedy, tragedy or both? Plus, how the Chipping Norton Scouts re-invented British baseball and the Queen of 19th-century science.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: As Roo Irvine and Phil Serrell motor through the Cotswolds, Phil picks up a Victorian marmalade cutter, while Roo hopes a 16th-century bronze thimble will earn her a big profit. But who will be victorious at the final auction in Newent?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton, in a bright red classic Alfa Romeo, visit some of the county's finest antique shops. They explore a cold war submarine and discover how Pocahontas came to Kent, before arriving at an auction in West Sussex.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items include a pair of medical leech jars and a sideboard that hides secret drawers.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects include a box of paints claimed to have been once owned by John Constable.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team disembark at the Steam Museum in Swindon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Pieces under the experts' eyes include a Trafalgar medal awarded to a boy sailor.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Pieces under the experts' eyes include a valuable cup and saucer bought at a boot sale.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Hopetoun House in Queensferry, Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Visitors bring their treasures to the forecourt of the British Museum in London.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce welcomes thousands of visitors to the gardens of Tatton Park in Cheshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team pay a return visit to the gardens of Tatton Park in Cheshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Among the objects exciting the experts is a collection of almost 500 ornamental pigs.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts head to Chatsworth House in Derbyshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team pay a second visit to Chatsworth House in Derbyshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for Blair Castle, near Pitlochry in Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for Hampton Court Castle, near Leominster.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Bryson Volrin encounters a curious sloth; Gordon Buchanan enters a deserted house that has been taken over by vampire bats.

programme.title: BBC Earth
programme.desc: BBC Earth brings you heart-pounding action, mind-blowing sights, and the wonder of this amazing planet we call home on Pluto TV.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Bryson Volrin encounters a curious sloth; Gordon Buchanan enters a deserted house that has been taken over by vampire bats.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Panama is home to one of the largest and most impressive birds of prey in the world - the harpy eagle. To track it down, Steve and the crew have to trek into a remote part of the Darien jungle.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: After swimming in shark-infested waters, Steve rappels down to a nest of killer bees with a painful outcome; a close encounter with a ragged tooth shark is followed by getting airborne with the black eagle.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve and the crew search for deadly animals in one of the hottest places on the planet; he comes close to a tiny but mighty spider; he tracks down elusive and deadly reptiles.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve is hot on the trail of Africa's big cats; he dons a camouflage suit to beat a leopard at its own game by hunting his crew, but it proves to be a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve showcases some of the largest deadly dinosaurs of all time.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is on a quest to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is on a quest to find the most dangerous dinosaur of all time.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan must overcome his own fear, black bears have a dangerous reputation and attack more people than any other bear in the world, but once he meets Lily, a tolerant bear, mother of Hope, Gordon feels heartbroken.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Summer arrives and Gordon finds out that Tiny the bear cub has been abandoned by her mother.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: A team of explorers set out on a wildlife adventure to the tropical island of Borneo for the elusive clouded leopard and the rare Borneo gibbon.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: Steve Backshall and his team decide to press on with their ascent of Mount Kuli.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.desc: The customers call the shots at a rowdy Staten Island bar where they pour their own drinks and cook their own food, so Jon tries to help the owners retake control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his first-ever emergency rescue, Jon uses his last resort to help the overwhelmed and grieving owner of Buffalo City Bar & Grille save her father's legacy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt and Hobie rescue a young boy who is being harassed by a thug and take care of him until they can get him to his mother, but he seems to be hiding a deep dark secret. Meanwhile, CJ falls for a handsome young man who turns out to be taboo.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Joey joins Mitch and Hobie in decorating for Christmas. CJ has a great time working with Father Ryan but starts to worry that he may misinterpret her warmth as flirting, and that he may be considering quitting the priesthood for her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan's visa is soon to expire, and he will be sent back to Australia unless he gets a green card. He plans on earning the money to purchase one in an upcoming boat race. Meanwhile Mitch’s mother visits.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie is kidnapped by an eco-terrorist. The Baywatch team must stop the terrorist before she blows up an oil rig with Stephanie constrained inside it!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch proposes to Tracy, but the happy moment is short-lived as she reveals she has a terminal illness. With the team being short-staffed it is up to Logan and Caroline to deal with reckless wave runners.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch is still mourning Tracy’s death, so Hobie seeks help from a radio show to help Mitch recover. Caroline resuscitates a man with AIDS, which puts a strain on her relationship with Logan. And CJ enters a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives a mysterious package his father had put together before he died. Mitch and his father never saw eye-to-eye, but this gift impacts Mitch more than he ever thought possible. Logan visits a hypnotist to deal with a past trauma.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Andy, an old friend of Mitch, visits Baywatch to complete four days of lifeguard service in order to remain on the active roster. But Andy's strong-arm tactics do not sit well with the other lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt and CJ stumble upon a homeless man who shockingly turns out to be someone they know very well. Meanwhile, Mitch must rescue a boy's brother from drug smugglers so the boy can receive a life-saving transplant of his brother's bone marrow.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When testing out a new flying machine, Mitch spots a makeshift raft with a stranded woman in it. Mitch must help the Chinese woman find her sister. Back at headquarters, Matt and Garner deal with a beach robbery scam.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Prominent British businessman Richard Branson visits Baywatch to perform several risky stunts, putting the lifeguards on high alert. Meanwhile, Mitch has to save one of Kaye's employees whose violent husband has come looking for her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie is thrilled when the “Johnny Danger Stunt Show" comes to the beach, but Mitch finds Johnny has questionable morals and is worried Hobie may follow his example. Matt is accused of sexual harassment by bad girl lifeguard Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch considers a new career working with Garner as a private eye. Logan cheats on Caroline again. The explosion of an offshore oil rig endangers Stephanie, Cody, and Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: As the crippled oil rig sinks and floods with water, Cody, Neely, and Stephanie begin a desperate rescue effort to save the two young couples, and themselves, until the Baywatch lifeguards can arrive to help.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Was this teacher drunk In her elementary school classroom? Listen to what this educator has to say.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's Ask Dr. Phil day. Is it an attractive woman's responsibility to tone down her looks on the job? Debrahlee made headlines saying she was fired for being too pretty. She says she was told her figure, pencil skirts & 3-inch heels were too distracting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he can't choose between his wife, Michele, and his girlfriend, who's calling herself "Sarah" to protect her identity. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lovie says a viral video of her son Darnell shows him attacking his girlfriend & dragging her. Darnell says he doesn't recognize himself & he wants to apologize to the world. Brianna says the attack was one of three beatings her sister endured that night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Autumn says she was called a “crazy, jealous girlfriend” after video of her keying her ex-boyfriend’s car went viral. She says ex-boyfriend, D’Andre, choked her, head-butted her and sexually assaulted her; D’Andre denies sexually assaulting her. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mark & ex-wife, Melissa, say daughter, Malia, 17, has been running away since age 13, a 6th grade school drop out, & has become physically abusive. They say 2 years ago she became involved with a 35-year-old man & they fear she'll end up dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Women: Are you dying to know what men really think? Comedian and radio and TV host Steve Harvey has all the "manswers"! In his book, Straight Talk, No Chaser, Steve dishes the dirt about unlocking the male mind and understanding the male game.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Libby & Brian are at war over custody of their two young children. Get a behind-the-scenes look at what made Dr. Phil consider canceling the show & learn why he refused to allow these exes on his stage! Don't miss the backstage drama on today's Dr. Phil!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Brittany who says dad Charlie is being scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie hopes to get married when they meet in person. The real women in the photos are on stage & Charlie goes face-to-face!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha & Danielle are angry with dad, Ron, who they say abandoned their dying mother, his wife of 30 yrs, to plan a wedding with a Kennedy heiress he met online. His daughters say "Misty Kennedy" is a catfish. Ron says "Misty" is the love of his life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robin says ex-husband, Daniel, kidnapped their two daughters. Daniel claims false--his goal is to protect his daughters! Robin says Daniel "convinced" their daughters to leave home & meet him on the corner with only the clothes on their backs. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Terrie says daughter Kelly accused her of molesting her 5-yr-old granddaughter. Terrie says Kelly attended a week-long desert retreat that affected her personality: Kelly says she saw aliens on the retreat who may have abducted, raped & impregnated her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil spoke with Karen & Jim desperate to remove their mooching son from their home. Kyle revealed why his parents were at fault for his financial situation. Dr. Phil enlists the help of TVs "Bar Rescue", Jon Taffer, with advice for Kyle. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Leah says mom Dora appears sweet but she's actually a narcissist, hypochondriac, drama queen & liar. Can this mother-daughter find common ground and rebuild? Plus Carrie says mom Paula, 61, has been meeting strangers online having sex. Dr. Phil weighs in.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: Shorty Kellms again short circuits fiancee Elverna's wedding plans, this time by marrying Mr. Drysdale's prettiest secretary.

programme.desc: The Clampett mansion is set up as a hotel for women, and banker Drysdale decides to extort a few dollars from his secretary guests.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies again meet "Honest John," the con man who had sold them half of Manhattan and then returned their journey.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny consults a psychiatrist to give "modern medicine" a chance to keep frogman Mark Templeton from turning into a real frog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny battles to keep her family out of the swimming pool, convinced that if they get wet they'll turn into frogs.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny invites Shorty Kellems back from the hills to help break up Elly May's romance with Mark Templeton.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny thinks Shorty Kellems has turned into a seal because he ignored her warnings about swimming in the Clampett pool.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is finally convinced that Elly May's boyfriend, Mark Templeton, is a human being -- not half-frog as she first suspected.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Granny, Elly May, and Jethro man the front lines against an expected invasion of grunion, which they believe to be hostile aliens.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies, encouraged by Mr. Drysdale, continue to guard the Malibu beach and repel the mythical Grunion invaders.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale's downtrodden bank secretaries organize to fight for better wages and working conditions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Elly May join the Women's Liberation Movement and leave all the household chores to Jed and Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly ladies move out of the Clampett mansion but Jed and Jethro replace them with a trio of Japanese beauties.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbilly women, assured of their equal rights, return to the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May gets a job at Mr. Drysdale's bank and moves into co-worker Jane Hathaway's apartment.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A fortune-hunting young man decides to amrry into the hillbilly family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jane Hathaway learns her new boyfriend is a fortune-hunter who would like to marry Elly May and her family's millions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.desc: Find out who Paul will nominate for eviction, who will win the final Veto competition of the summer and which houseguests will make it to the Final 3.

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The last battles, the last eviction, and the final live vote determine the winner of the $500,000. Also, the winner of 'America's Favorite Houseguest' is announced.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: High tech takes over Big Brother for its 20th anniversary, as 16 all-new Houseguests face unexpected twists and upgraded power in a house inspired by Silicon Valley.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The two-night premiere event continues with the first HoH competition of the summer; who will grab all the power and who will be nominated for eviction?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: One Houseguest will earn a power in the BB app store and one will receive a punishment.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will the Power of Veto save either Sam or Steve, or will the new "bonus life" power change the game?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Find out who will be the first person (or robot) evicted from the house, Sam or Steve.

programme.title: Big Brother

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will win the Power of Veto and will it be used to save either Scottie or Winston from eviction?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will be evicted from the Big Brother house? Winston... or Swaggy C?

programme.title: Baby Boy
programme.desc: Jody is a 20-year-old African American in South Central L.A. who is trying to live large but doesn't have a job. Growing up is tough on Jody, but a series of events force him to learn lessons about living, loving and surviving as a man in the hood.

programme.title: New Jack City
programme.desc: Wesley Snipes stars as Nino Brown, an American success story with a twist. He's young, handsome, smart, rich, and prominent in his community.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: Juice
programme.desc: Q. Raheem. Bishop. Steel. They're four Harlem friends who spend their days hanging out and looking for a way to get the power and respect they call Juice. Q hopes to earn respect by becoming a scratch 'n' mix DJ.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Jimi: All Is By My Side
programme.desc: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When a gang of drug dealers move into a nearby house, Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) and Eleanor (ELLA JOYCE) try to organize their neighbors into a non-violent protest movement to scare them away.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Joey (ROCKY CARROLL) wins The Fly Guys, a rock 'n' roll group, as payment on a bet. Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) becomes the group's new manager.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Joey (ROCKY CARROLL) learns a harsh lesson about surviving in the world of show business when he's hired as a trumpet player for the famous Les McCann Band.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Eleanor's (ELLA JOYCE) birthday party is ruined when Roc (CHARLES S. DUTTON) loses all patience with Joey's (ROCKY CARROLL) irresponsibility and evicts him.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont consults an astrologer who tells him he's a double Libra and to be nice to his father. Fred, positive that he's dying, thinks his son's solicitous attitude is due to his son's not wanting to reveal the doctor's real diagnosis.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred is witness to a burglary at Julio's house, but he refuses to identify the burglars for the police. To teach Fred a lesson, Julio and Lamont steal the junk truck.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Recording group The Three Degrees guest as themselves. Lamont and Rollo try to make big stars of the singing trio over the objections of Fred.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred buys a 'hot' television and gets into hot water. After Fred has made his purchase, his friend Grady visits the Sanford home and declares that the set is the one that was stolen from his house.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont and Rollo mistakenly go to a gay bar. Fred's friend Bubba sees them go into the bar and tells Fred that his son is gay. Fred refuses to believe it. Later, Fred and Bubba decide to investigate the bar to see why Lamont went.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont and Julio go into the used auto parts business and drive Fred to skid row. Fred thinks Lamont's new venture means his son is deserting their partnership, so he moves into a skid row mission to make Lamont feel bad.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: It takes some doing to convince Fred to make his first airplane flight. An inheritance left to Fred by a late uncle doesn't seem reason enough to fly -- even for the money-hungry Fred.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred succumbs to Donna's pressures and agrees to get married, but his family has other ideas. Fred and Donna plan to wed in a private ceremony at the Sanford home and Lamont uses this as a ploy to try to get rid of Donna.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Roy & Barbara are selling door-to-door; Stiller & Meara do a women's lib skit and join Flip for a boxing sketch.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Ruth Buzzi does her park bench bit and joins Lee Marvin & Flip for a King Henry VIII sketch; Jackie does his slideshow routine.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: The President (Conway) gets advice from his janitor; Flip & Melba are domestic cellmates and Bing & Tim visit Charley’s Diner.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: The Fifth Dimension tell their (sort of) origin story and the Pink Pirate (Conway) accosts Flip & Florence LaRue in Central Park.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Ed Asner plays a ship's captain, cheats at cards (w/Flip, Channing & George Wyle) and gets fixed up with Carol at a resort.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha is off visiting cousins out of town. Meanwhile, Dee thinks Frank is spending too much time with “the boys” including his brother Bernie.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha has her own car, so Frank gives her a credit card for emergencies only. When she goes out with her new boyfriend, Q, he convinces her to let him drive her car.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha and Kim discover some boys at school have a list of the girls with various physical attributes including the “biggest booty” and Moesha is astounded to find her name on the list.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha has befriended a Latina student, Teresa.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: A school fundraiser has boys putting together “date baskets” on which the girls bid.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan continues to struggle with the business, leaving 9MAG at a crossroads. Prince and Draya have family obligations motivating them to take actions into their own hands. Kitty has new plans for her future.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: Attempting to reopen the IAM shop, KP and Tim are faced with a fractured staff that has questionable allegiances. Alana is back in LA and ready to dive into tattooing. Nessie and Vudu are unsure whether the shop is a welcoming option for employment.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: The sit-down between KP and Lemeir brings about a revelation that catches Ceaser by surprise and leads to new alliances within the Crew. Star and Tim try to ease the minds of team IAM as a deadline is set to recommit to the shop.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: As the day of reckoning dawns, KP, Tim, Star and Cory are surprised by who shows up at the IAM shop willing to work...and who doesn't. Vudu meets with her biological father for the first time since childhood and is unsure she wants to hear the truth.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles

programme.desc: Daniel is running first aid training today and Charlie and Brian drive him to breaking point.

programme.desc: Brendan O'Connor, the owner of Valco, comes to assess his daughter's progress. Daniel and Gavin have their work cut out trying to pass her off as competent.

programme.desc: The boys face uncertainty when their landlord evicts them without notice from their flat.

programme.desc: The boys are introduced to Cynthia's new boyfriend Cassius. Stylax plays a prank on Aurelius.

programme.desc: Doug Kersey gets close to the lead investigator in a strangulation case that links back to a chief suspect in a similar case from years before.

programme.desc: Kersey leads a high-stakes investigation into a violent murder committed by a generally non-violent thief, who claims he was hired to frighten the victim.

programme.desc: A blackmailer poisons seven random jars of baby food at a supermarket and publicly demands a ransom, putting Wycliffe in a race against time to discover if this is an act of terrorism or a vendetta.

programme.desc: Whilst in New York, the Saint watches his friend, reporter Lester Boyd, launch a television attack on corrupt union boss Nat Grindel. Shortly afterwards Boyd is killed when a bomb explodes in his apartment.

programme.desc: On a flight to Paris, the Saint meets Valerie North, who is on her way to meet her long-lost brother, only to find on arrival that he has been murdered, for a St. Christopher medal taken from around his neck.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Una periodista desaparece mientras investiga un reportaje sobre un hombre inocente condenado por asesinato, Danny y Baez esperan que reexaminar el caso original ayude a encontrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que Anthony es baleado mientras entrevista a un testigo para un juicio por asesinato, Erin pide a su archienemigo Danny que lo ayude a encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Henry es el testigo clave en el caso de Danny y Baez, su constante intromisión molesta tanto a Danny que termina llevándolos a una pista valiosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca respuestas cuando el actual esposo de la exesposa de Gibbs y Fornell es secuestrado de manera sospechosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una discrepancia en los restos de ADN al investigar el accidente de un avión militar que transportaba ataúdes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS sigue buscando a un marine desaparecido; Gibbs y Ziva viajan a Afganistán, último lugar conocido del marine. Mientras tanto, Tony revela sus mayores temores y Gibbs revive momentos de su pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el padre de Tony es encontrado dentro de un auto con un cuerpo sin vida en el maletero, el equipo de NCIS debe determinar si es capaz de cometer un asesinato.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un destacado abogado desaparece en Boston, la UAC descubre secretos en su pasado que podrían señalar las razones de su desaparición.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy proves he has extra-sensory perception and predicts an exciting future for Walt. Lyle can't keep his mind off Santana and starts to think about taking their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Hurricane Martha lands on the party house and boys do their best not to let it ruin their night. The next day Mattie calls a family meeting to apologize and the housemates start airing out all their issues.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Now that the sage smoke has finally cleared the air in the house, the roommates hope that Tiffany and Lauren's boyfriends won't bring new drama when they come to visit. Bubba and Destin struggle to stay focused on their mission.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The trip to Miami gets off to a great start until the sun goes down and shots get poured. When Mattie goes missing, Don "Daddy" Johnson is on the case. Back at the house, Lyle makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle's girlfriend, Santana, comes to visit but little does she know her life is going to change forever. All of the roommates come together to plan the most perfect marriage proposal for Lyle.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle gets an answer for his proposal and the gang throws Mattie an 80s skating birthday party. Tiffany learns some troubling news about Hannah's boyfriend, Cody. Martha redecorates the boys' bedroom.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: It's the last weekend in St. Pete and the roommates want to go out with a bang. Single Lauren hits the town, Murray catches a shark, Walt brings home an animal lover and Hannah confronts Cody about his infidelity.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast gets together to rehash their latest vacation in St. Petersburg, Florida… the good, the bad, and the hurricanes.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The crew arrives at their beautiful new vacation house in Savannah, Georgia. Lauren and Tiffany struggle to keep an explosive secret from Lyle, while Murray and Hannah must console Mattie… after Daddy calls her Martha.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Tiffany and Lauren tell Lyle devastating news about his fiancée, Santana. In an attempt to woo a woman into bed, Walt plays some sweet, out-of-tune tunes on his guitar. Daddy brings the wrong girl home from the bar.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Murray wraps up his personal business in Mississippi and returns to the house to learn that the girls are still all up in Lyle and Santana's relationship. Murray convinces Santana to come visit so the couple can talk face to face & figure things out.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle gets a shocking text from Santana. The gang goes ghost hunting and may bring home more than they bargained for. Mattie has to choose between her roommates and her family back home.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Marcos iba manejando y se percata que a su lado va una chica que se desnuda al conducir, él choca. Por otro lado, Jacobo es el principal sospechoso por la desaparición de su mujer y su hija.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Para demostrar que cualquier persona puede ser infiel, Melisa contrata a Victoria. Kalan, que vive como un homeless, le regala a su amigo Diego un local en NY a cambio de dejarlo dormir atrás.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Cuando nacieron Nataly y Liliana las intercambiaron en el hospital, ahora se pelean la herencia. También, Carlos y Karen se disputan la tutela de su hermano discapacitado, pero lo hacen por dinero.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Zaida sabe que su esposo es investigador privado, pero descubrió que se acostó con prostitutas. Por otro lado, la hija de Alexander dice que es reencarnada y reconoce a su familia.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Solanch y Marcelo tienen un albergue de transgéneros, Marcelo ahora quiere sacarlos. También, en un viaje de vacaciones, el mar arrastró a la sobrina de Miguel y murió, él tiene un trauma.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Juan Pablo fue alejado de su madre cuando tenía cuatro meses, años después la encuentra enferma. También, Raisa perdió una hija y adopta una niña que estaba en el sistema.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Paula demanda a José, porque su pitbull hirió al de ella durante una pelea. En otro caso, Kelly acusó de violación a Ray y sus amigos, pero no los encontraron culpables.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Pedro perdió sensibilidad en su pene cuando le hicieron la circuncisión, quiere que su hermano gemelo le done su miembro. Patricia salió embarazada de Marco, pero no ha elegido al mejor padre.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Con apenas dos años, la hija de Yanexis tiene sangrado menstrual y es rechazada en la guardería. Al salir de su país, Lourdes dejó a su hijo en manos del hombre que la maltrataba y torturaba.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Raúl cumplió injusta prisión por un crimen que no cometió, cobró indemnización y su ex reclama su parte. Además, Laura estudia audiovisuales y Ruby rompió su cámara por grabar un cortometraje.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Claudia sufrió un accidente con su familia y desde que salió del coma no recuerda quiénes son. En otro caso, Eva y su hija tienen cada cual una tienda de muñecas; a una sola le va bien.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Patricia es transexual y trabaja como actriz porno, pero no a cambio de dinero. Por otro lado, Rossi es una joven que tiene problemas de conducta y Gladis la secuestra para corregirla.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Miguel y su hijo compusieron una canción, pero el joven creo una versión vulgar que afectó el prestigio de su padre. Además, Yissel aprendió 'kickboxing' y logró vengarse de su violador.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: José desaparece y Carolina tiene que vender un riñón por algo de dinero. Por otro lado, Teresa descubre que Israel le es infiel y por venganza hace público su engaño con un cartel.

programme.title: Animals Unscripted
programme.desc: These animals have personality and aren’t afraid to show it. Get ready for the most untamed critters in the wild kingdom. Don’t they know they’re being recorded?

programme.title: Meowathon!
programme.desc: Sit back and give those paws a rest - it's a Meowathon! All of your favorite cat content, all day - 10 AM to 8 PM EST.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Water boarder hits buoy; cat plays with hole in tent; kid on my shoulders.

programme.title: Lionman: African Safari
programme.desc: Craig has now secured himself what could be his next cat sanctuary in Africa, where he finishes the build for his new rare Barbary lion cub Shia Junior in preparation for the next big vision.

programme.title: Best Pets of the Year 2018
programme.desc: The Pet Collective is home to the top trending clips, most entertaining memes, and funniest animal videos online. Simply put, we think animals are the best ever.

programme.title: Animals Unscripted
programme.desc: This really could be the title for any cat episode, but we chose this one.

programme.title: Animals Unscripted: Curious Cats
programme.desc: One cat clip just leads to another" - Ernest Hemingway (kind of)

programme.title: A Cat and Mouse Game
programme.desc: Marcel the cat watches and attempts to capture Cheeky, the mischievous mouse who constantly eludes him. This game of chase takes us past a variety of farm animals and wildlife as we discover that, in the end, a cat and mouse can become friends.

programme.title: Animal Zone
programme.desc: What's the difference between a stray cat, a feral cat, and a socialized cat? Santa Barbara Humane answers that question.

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: Can a shy and skittish shelter dog recover and adjust to life in his new home? Did the British Shorthair cat breed inspire a literary masterpiece?

programme.title: We Heart Animals
programme.desc: Cute clips of smart (and not so smart) pets.

programme.title: We Heart Animals: It's Raining...
programme.desc: ...cats and dogs. Looks like this storm will last about 30 minutes.

programme.title: Animal Zone
programme.desc: At Hearts Alive Village in Las Vegas, a special needs kitten shows that all animals can be loving pets even with some shortcomings.

programme.title: The Pet Collective
programme.desc: A day in the life of paw-some kittens! From playful mornings to cozy nights, witness the adorable antics.

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: Do you want to be eco-friendly when it comes to your pets? We'll show you how! Our Pet Vet covers the subject of pet anxiety. Did you know that all Siamese kittens are born white?

programme.title: National Cat Day Marathon!
programme.desc: It's National Cat Day! Thank you meow-y much for tuning in. Sit back and enjoy an all-day marathon of your favorite feline friends.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Cat and rat; goat shows its tongue on fence; parrot and dirty crockery.

programme.title: Cat Daddies
programme.desc: A heartwarming collective portrait of eight unique men whose lives have been changed by their love for cats. Some of these men will navigate the unprecedented challenges of 2020 with the help of these feline friends.

programme.desc: Donny drops the lawsuit against Frasier and Daphne because he's met another woman who he has decides to marry. Frasier dates his lawyer Abbey but accuses her of overcharging him for legal expenses.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier betrays Roz by staying friends with her cheating ex-boyfriend.

programme.desc: When Frasier appears to be in denial over losing his job, Niles, Roz and Martin join forces to bring him back to reality.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles isn't too thrilled at the prospect of his father moving in – until he realizes that Daphne is part of the package.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles will stop at nothing to get tickets to the hottest play in town.

programme.desc: Frasier suspects that his gorgeous new girlfriend is just using him to get free psychiatric advice.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Mistakenly believing he's got a secret admirer, Frasier jeopardizes his new relationship by trying to double his pleasure.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Maris freezes Niles' assets, he's forced to sublet his luxurious apartment and move into a "low-rent" complex.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Valentine's Day finds Niles, Frasier, Martin and Daphne on three very different kinds of dates.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires an aggressive new divorce lawyer who may wind up exposing his long-running crush on Daphne.

programme.title: Duelo en Diablo
programme.desc: El explorador Jess Remsberg dirige una caravana a través de territorio hostil hasta Fort Conchos, pero en su valor se oculta un motivo: saldar cuentas con el hombre que cree que mató a su esposa. Protagonizada por James Garner y Sidney Poitier.

programme.title: El tren del infierno
programme.desc: Mientras un tren atraviesa las Montañas Rocosas, los pasajeros están siendo asesinados. La única esperanza es John Deakin, el cual descubre un secreto que explota en un torrente de revelaciones impactantes, peleas y tiroteos explosivos.

programme.title: Fuerza 10 de Navarone
programme.desc: Durante los días más oscuros de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, los ejércitos de Hitler están asaltando a través de Europa, aniquilando toda oposición a su paso.

programme.title: Una bala es mi testigo
programme.desc: Un extraño llega a un pueblo para vengar la muerte de sus padrinos.

programme.title: La edad de la tentación
programme.desc: La negligencia de los padres que no asumen su responsabilidad en la educación sexual de los hijos provoca la ruina de muchas vidas.

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: Thelma y Louise
programme.desc: En una de las mejores películas de carretera de todos los tiempos, Geena Davis y Susan Sarandon, en su paseo de la fama eterno, se convierten en dos mujeres que se embarcan en una serie de crímenes por todo el suroeste de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Tierra Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando una derrota en el ring deja a Lion y a su hermano y mánager, Stan, en deuda con un jefe criminal, todos se ven obligados arriesgarlo todo en un torneo de boxeo a puño limpio mientras luchan por una vida mejor.

programme.title: Jade
programme.desc: Corelli está hasta el cuello en un caso que puede conducirlo donde no quiere ir. Chazz Palminteri interpreta a Matt, abogado y amigo de Corelli. Linda Fiorentino es la esposa de Matt, Trina; una psicóloga capaz de todo incluso de asesinar.

programme.title: Hungar Ward en español
programme.desc: MTV Documentary Films presenta la nominada al Oscar® HUNGER WARD. Con acceso sin precedentes y filmado dentro de dos de los centros de alimentación terapéutica más activos de Yemen.

programme.title: Sospechosos comunes
programme.desc: Ganadora de dos Premios de la Academia® de 1995 (Mejor Guión Original y Mejor Actor de Reparto), esta magistral película sobre cinco delincuentes y un misterioso jefe del bajo mundo que cautivó al público y se ganó la reputación de ser un "nuevo clásico".

programme.title: Amores peligrosos
programme.desc: En este drama criminal, Matthew McConaughey (El club de los desahuciados) interpreta a un reportero que regresa a su ciudad natal de Florida para investigar un caso que involucra a un preso condenado a muerte.

programme.title: Fled: Corre por tu vida
programme.desc: Una divertida e ingeniosa aventura de acción. Fled sigue el rastro de dos prisioneros fugitivos en su carrera por encontrar un alijo oculto y un disco incriminatorio, que podría terminar con la mafia cubana o matarlos.

programme.title: El príncipe y yo
programme.desc: Una fantástica historia de amor sobre una estudiante de medicina que se enamora de un príncipe danés que se negó a seguir las tradiciones de sus padres y vino a EE.UU. a rebelarse.

programme.title: Padre soltero
programme.desc: Ben Affleck, Jennifer López y George Carlin protagonizan esta comedia irresistible. Un relato sincero sobre un hombre que de repente es un padre soltero, aprendiendo que debe aceptar su identidad y reconocer lo que lo hace feliz.

programme.title: Labios rojos
programme.desc: Ricardo obtiene una gran promoción, pero la presión por el éxito laboral lo llevará al fracaso en asuntos maritales. Una comedia moderna y conocedora sobre los altibajos del trabajo y el amor.

programme.title: El cuerpo del delito
programme.desc: Tras una noche de pasión desenfrenada, Rebecca Carlson (Madonna) será juzgada por asesinato. Ahora está en manos de su abogado (Willem Dafoe) demostrar su inocencia, aunque el camino hacia la verdad tiene tantas curvas como su seductora cliente.

programme.title: Entre el amor y el engaño
programme.desc: Sydney Carpenter no puede evitar sentir que tiene la vida perfecta hasta que su esposo y su hijo desaparecen. Mientras busca a su familia, se da cuenta de que su marido no era quien ella pensaba.

programme.title: ¿Quién Manda?
programme.desc: Una pareja no comprometida que solo busca diversión entra en una batalla de egos mientras se enamoran.

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Hombres de coraje
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, Tom Sizemore y Thomas Jane protagonizan la estremecedora historia de héroes americanos que naufragaron en aguas infestadas de tiburones en los últimos días de la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Códigos de guerra
programme.desc: John Woo dirige este épico drama de acción sobre un soldado de la Segunda Guerra Mundial (Nicolas Cage) asignado para proteger a un soldado navajo (Adam Beach) ... y el código secreto que conoce.

programme.title: Highlander III: Dimensión final
programme.desc: En este tercer capítulo de la franquicia de acción trepidante, el inmortal Connor MacLeod está destinado a una batalla decisiva con su despiadado enemigo eterno, Kane.

programme.title: El cuervo 2: Ciudad de Ángeles
programme.desc: Esta secuela veloz y llena de acción de "El cuervo" sigue el ascenso de la víctima de asesinato Ashe Corven, que regresa a la vida gracias a un misterioso cuervo. Con la ayuda de una mujer llamada Sarah, se venga de sus asesinos uno por uno.

programme.title: El gran rescate
programme.desc: En medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, el Batallón nro. 6 de exploradores recibe una misión de proporciones heroicas: ir 50 kilómetros tras las líneas enemigas y liberar a más de 500 prisioneros de guerra estadounidenses.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Abre los ojos
programme.desc: César es un casanova exitoso enamorado de la belleza Sophia (Penélope Cruz), pero una ex celosa lo involucra en un accidente que le destruye la cara.

programme.title: Huachicolero
programme.desc: Un enamoramiento inocente lleva a Lalo, de 14 años de edad, a descender al mundo criminal de la extracción ilegal de gasolina. Lo que comienza como un atajo hacia el último smartphone se convierte, rápidamente, en una pelea mortal por su vida.

programme.title: Septiembre, un llanto en silencio
programme.desc: En medio de un ataque terrorista perpetrado por la guerrilla un 5 de septiembre de 1980, Teresa queda sorda a los tres meses de edad y fallece su madre. Junto a su padre, enfrentarán la soledad, el dolor de crecer, el miedo y el amor incondicional.

programme.title: Sin muertos no hay carnaval
programme.desc: Un hombre rico intenta desalojar 250 familias que están ocupando las tierras que heredó. El líder de estas familias está dispuesto a negociar, pero la disputa entre ambos podría ser sangrienta.

programme.title: Caso 39
programme.desc: Renée Zellweger, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza la película de suspenso sobrenatural de una trabajadora social, que tiene asignado el raro e inquietante caso de Lillith Sullivan, una niña con un extraño y misterioso pasado.

programme.title: Sospechoso cero
programme.desc: Un agente del FBI que investiga la muerte de un asesino serial sigue la pista de un justiciero que dedica su vida a perseguir asesinos seriales.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: Una mujer que es la última en salir de su oficina en la víspera de Navidad debe confiar en su ingenio para sobrevivir cuando está atrapada en un estacionamiento con un guardia de seguridad demente.

programme.title: El regreso de los muertos vivientes
programme.desc: En su primer día en un almacén de material médico, Freddy (Thom Mathews) libera sin querer un gas tóxico de un contenedor militar secreto. El gas reanima un ejército de cadáveres, que salen de la tumba con un hambre voraz... ¡de cerebros!

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: Bienvenido a Belko Industries, un tranquilo lugar de trabajo que está a punto de convertirse en un sangriento campo de batalla, cuando 80 empleados son encerrados en su edificio de oficinas y obligados a jugar un juego despiadado de matar o morir.

programme.title: El Perfume: Historia de un asesino
programme.desc: En Francia, en el siglo 18, vivió Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, que nació con un gran sentido del olfato. Pero cuando su don se transforma en obsesión, lucha por crear el perfume más excitante del mundo matando jovencitas para capturar su esencia.

programme.title: Cursed
programme.desc: El guionista y el director de Scream, vuelven a unirse para dar otro paseo por el lado oscuro. Luego de un ataque brutal de parte de una criatura terrorífica, dos hermanos exhiben comportamientos que los hacen creer que los ha mordido un hombre lobo.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Los jóvenes y vibrantes neoyorquinos Alex y Nancy encontraron un lugar perfecto para establecerse y compartir un futuro brillante: la planta baja de un hermoso y viejo dúplex. Pero su nuevo hogar viene con un accesorio permanente que no esperaban.

programme.title: The Champion
programme.desc: Christian es un futbolista talentoso, imprevisible y rebelde. Tras su última "metedura de pata", el presidente de su equipo decide asignarle un tutor personal que le ayude a controlar su temperamento.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su televisión, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que le muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son lo mejor!

programme.title: El Loco Superdotado
programme.desc: El constantemente pobre Darryl se arriesga a perder su trabajo soñado en Wall Street hasta que encuentra un experimento que paga bien y que le otorga sentidos superhumanos... y competitividad. Pero con los efectos secundarios, ¡todo puede pasar!

programme.title: A Toda Madre: A Toda Madre
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand y Seth Rogen son el dúo cómico perfecto al embarcarse en un gran viaje. Cuando Andy invita a su madre a un viaje de 8 días y 4800 kilómetros por el país, cuanto más lejos viajan, más cercanos se vuelven.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: Gunslinger
programme.desc: When the town marshal is gunned down, his wife Rose (Beverly Garland) dons his badge. But now an evil dancehall diva (Allison Hayes) wants her dead and hires a gunslinger (John Ireland), who agrees to kill Rose...until he falls in love with her!

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: Gregory Peck, Anthony Quinn and David Niven are Allied saboteurs assigned an impossible mission: infiltrate an impregnable Nazi-held island and destroy the two enormous long-range field guns that prevent the rescue of 2,000 trapped British soldiers.

programme.title: The Spy Who Came in From the Cold
programme.desc: Oscar® nominee Richard Burton* is the burnt-out British agent who refuses to “come in from the cold” to take a desk job.

programme.desc: Bogart plays an escaped con who has nothing to lose. March is a suburban Everyman who has everything to lose - his family is held hostage by Bogart.

programme.desc: Sergeant Carter's date has a friend she doesn't want to leave alone so she tells the Sergeant that it's a double date or nothing. As a last resort the Sergeant invites Pyle.

programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N. Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck.

programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train "Killer" a German Sheppard intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat.

programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation, Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job. Of course, what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right.

programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carter's mission.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant, Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver. When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth, the whole truth and nothing but the truth.

programme.desc: When Gomer's cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomer's uniforms and then wanders the base, everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind.

programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carter's sister. Carter is determined to break them up.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.desc: Gomer won't rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat.

programme.desc: Rob finds himself very out of place at a dinner party for celebrated literati.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Tracy Rattigan, the show's guest host while Alan Brady is on vacation, is a charming but incorrigible flirt.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura's old flame re-enters the Petries' lives as Alan Brady's newest sponsor.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recalls the hectic days after Ritchie was born when he was sure the hospital had given him and Laura the wrong baby.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix finds a virago of a housekeeper to take care of Oscar while he is recuperating at home from an ulcer attack.

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Felix refuses to lend financial assistance to Oscar to back a dubious invention, Oscar finds another way of getting the money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: In order to win favor with his new girlfriend, Oscar goes on a neatness kick, with Felix's warm support and cooperation.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Tensions run high in the police department and in Sparta when Bubba is accused of attacking a black woman. And when a second woman comes forward from Bubba's past with similar claims, Virgil steps in to try and help clear his name.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sparta is celebrating their high school's victory at the regional basketball tournament, but the shock of a deadly hit-and-run accident after the game turns their happiness into a nightmare. Detective Tibbs struggles to find the driver responsible.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While Chief Bill Gillespie is out of town, a series of mysterious fires break out in town. Virgil (Howard Rollins) and the rest of the Sparta police department struggle to find out who is setting these arson fires that soon turn deadly.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When a couple walking their dog in the forest discover a human leg bone, the Sparta police immediately question an eccentric old lady named Adah Boone, known as the Pig Lady, who lives nearby and who everyone believes is a witch.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Detective Tibbs investigates Chief Gillespie's kidnapping, all the signs seem to point to a racially motivated crime, but Virgil and officer Bubba Skinner are convinced that acting Chief Tom Dugan may somehow be involved.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Althea Tibbs is raped by a fellow teacher, the Sparta police find it difficult to get a conviction because the man's loyal wife has given him an alibi. Virgil desperately wants to avenge Althea's assault and is forced to a near-breaking point.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Someone tries to kill Ken Mitchell, the head of a toy-making firm. Not wanting a violent incident to be associated with a toy business, Mitchell instead hires Joe Mannix to find out who might have tried to kill him.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Tom Fortune, the rising young scion of a mobster family, tries to hire Mannix to shadow his wife, whom he suspects of being unfaithful, when Fortune is gunned down.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A man named Tom Farnon suspects his wife of having an affair, and follows her to his boat where she is to meet her lover.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Police Lt. Larry Gifford follows a tip leading him to a warehouse, where he surprises a man apparently committing a burglary.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is called to the office of an air freight company and asked to investigate some cargo thefts, unaware that this is a ruse to allow the operators of the company to substitute a double in his place.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is participating in an auto race when he suddenly begins to experience hallucinations. The resulting crash lands him in a private hospital, where the delusions and paranoia continue.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Robbins falls for a public defender representing a psychopath, who is trying to eliminate witnesses to a murder.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Four cons escape and their longtime prison guard dedicates himself to bringing them back personally, frustrating Stone and Robbins who are perpetually one step behind the man who knows his prisoners' every probable move.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.desc: Ruth Roman, Alex Nicol and Tim O'Connor star in this compelling study of allegiance and sacrifice as a group of lunar astronauts discover a strange space vessel full of fugitives from another world…and they have a desperate story to tell.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie comes home from the laundromat in fury. It seems that he overloaded one of the machines causing the machine to eat his clothes and cause a flood. The irate proprietor of the laundromat, soon stops by to get Archie to pay for the damages.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.desc: Beauty is the name of the game as the training camp candidates get major hair makeovers in preparation for their first solo publicity stills. But not everyone is picture perfect and by the end of the week, there will be a heartbreaking elimination.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The end of training camp is just around the corner and after Kelli's annual etiquette luncheon the girls are on their best behavior. A tough new choreographer introduces the girls to real dance technique with devastating results.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The summer is coming to a close, and there are now 36 girls poised to become America's sweethearts. Kelli and Judy are concerned the team is not ready and there may have to be more cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions. After performing their freestyle dance routines for the judges, only half make it to the semi-finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Making it this far is one thing - enduring Training Camp is another. The hopeful group of 43 is far from the final squad, and DCC Director Kelli Finglass quickly reminds them that there will be cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After saying goodbye to one of their own, reality sets in for the remaining training camp candidates: nobody's position on the squad is secure. The girls are fitted for the revealing DCC uniforms, then sweat their way through a punishing physical workout

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates don't know what hit them when tough as nails and brutally honest guest choreographer Kitty Carter teaches a class. Then, the rookies get one step closer to transforming into Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies get to wear the iconic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders uniform for the very first time during a professional modeling shoot. Then the girls have a life-changing experience skydiving with the legendary Army parachute team, the Golden Knights!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC training camp comes down to the last grueling rehearsals and whose long legs fit into the famous kick-line. The cheerleaders attend a bikini boot-camp for last-minute toning. Then, amid tears of disappointment and shock, Kelli makes the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Over 600 excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the finals audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp begins! The newly elected training camp candidates are excited, even star-struck, as they meet the veterans for the first time at Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The group competes in a grueling army fitness test to try and earn the privilege of being on the elite "Power Squad." At that evening's rehearsal, the first cuts will be made.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies are given "makeovers" to transform them into the image of a DCC.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The entire squad needs a wake-up call and guest choreographer Kitty Carter gives it to them.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
